# Voluntary Bankruptcy Petition - How to File [2026] - Voluntary Petition
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> How to file a voluntary bankruptcy petition. Forms, schedules, filing fees, and step-by-step instructions for Chapter 7 and 13. 2026 ...

## About
voluntarypetition.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Approved Credit Counseling Providers for Bankruptcy - Voluntary Petition: https://voluntarypetition.org/approved-providers.html
- Bankruptcy Attorney Fees: What to Expect - voluntarypetition.org - Voluntary Petition: https://voluntarypetition.org/attorney-fees.html
- The Cost of NOT Filing Bankruptcy - voluntarypetition.org - Voluntary Petition: https://voluntarypetition.org/cost-of-not-filing.html
- Debtor Education Course: The Second Required Course - Voluntary Petition: https://voluntarypetition.org/debtor-education.html
- Exceptions to the Credit Counseling Requirement for Bankruptcy - Voluntary Petition: https://voluntarypetition.org/exceptions.html
- Can I File Bankruptcy for Free? Fee Waivers and Installment Plans - voluntarypetition.org - Voluntary Petition: https://voluntarypetition.org/fee-waiver.html
- Bankruptcy Filing Fees by Chapter (2024-2026) - voluntarypetition.org - Voluntary Petition: https://voluntarypetition.org/filing-fees.html
- Hidden Costs of Bankruptcy You Should Know About - voluntarypetition.org - Voluntary Petition: https://voluntarypetition.org/hidden-costs.html
- Voluntary Bankruptcy Petition - How to File [2026] - Voluntary Petition: https://voluntarypetition.org/
- Pre-Filing Credit Counseling: The First Required Course - Voluntary Petition: https://voluntarypetition.org/pre-filing.html
- Privacy Policy: https://voluntarypetition.org/privacy.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
